name: Axis Bank AURA Credit Card
exclusions: transactions excluded under Axis Bank AURA Credit Card terms
additionalBenefits: Decathlon OMNI Gift Card worth Rs 750 as welcome benefit
2 EDGE REWARD Points per Rs 200 on eligible spends
5X EDGE REWARD Points on insurance spends, with maximum transaction capped at Rs 10,000
4 free video doctor consultations per month via Practo
4 interactive video fitness sessions per month via Fitternity
Access to 16 recorded fitness sessions per month
Annual discount up to Rs 500 on health checkup
Nutrition and diet subscription discounts as per Axis AURA programme terms
Dining Delights discounts at participating restaurants
1% fuel surcharge waiver on eligible fuel transactions

salaried: Primary cardholder should be 18 to 70 years of age and resident of India or NRI
selfEmployed: Primary cardholder should be 18 to 70 years of age and resident of India or NRI
